version_description: Simplified the tab from seantran7890 and sourced from the youtube video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5yQqGfBRPcI for the acoustic version.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
WIND UP MISSIN' YOU (2024) by Tucker Wetmore

Tuning: Standard. All chords are relative. This is just a simplified version of seantran7890 tab. 
This is also how it's played in this live session https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5yQqGfBRPcI

* - single strum


[tab](riff) Intro and verse
   [ch]E[/ch]                                      [ch]A[/ch]
e|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
B|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
G|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
D|-4h6-6-4-----------4h6-6-4------------|--4h6-6-4-4\1-1-2--4h6-6-4-4\1-1-2----|
A|----------4h6-6-7-----------4h6-6-7---|--------------------------------------|
E|--------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|[/tab]


Chords:
[ch]E[/ch]      022100
[ch]A[/ch]      002220
[ch]C#m[/ch]    X46654
[ch]B[/ch]      X24442
[ch]F#m[/ch]    X02010

[Intro]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I know I might look like[/tab]

Another ball cap on a barstool
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
Underneath a PBR light[/tab]

Saying everything under the moon
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
To get you into my arms tonight[/tab]

You probably heard it all a thousand times
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]
But it ain't what it looks like[/tab]

Girl, let me tell you what it looks like

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]

And you can crash on me all night
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]

A little what I'm doing for the rest of my life 'cause
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You look like I'm done looking[/tab]

But, girl, the hard truth is
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
                                             E (riff)
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin' you

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I've gotta tell you, baby, I've been[/tab]

The kind of boy your daddy never wanted you
[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]
To go and fall in love with[/tab]

The kind of boys you're probably
                N.C.
Done with their dumb shit, yeah
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I bet you've heard the stories and[/tab]

Can't say I'm proud of that but
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I've turned the page on the old me[/tab]

And now I ain't lookin' back 'cause

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]

And you can crash on me all night
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]

A little what I'm doing for the rest of my life 'cause
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You look like I'm done looking[/tab]

But, girl, the hard truth is
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin'[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
Missin' you in the mornin'[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]A[/ch]
Probably for the next few years[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]*
And when I look back on it[/tab]

I still see you right here

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You look like waves on a sunset[/tab]

And you can crash on me all night
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You look like wine in a truck bed[/tab]

A little what I'm doing for the rest of my life 'cause
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You look like I'm done looking[/tab]

But, girl, the hard truth is
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
If this night don't turn into two[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]E[/ch]
You look like I'm gonna wind up missin' you[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Wind up missin' you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]
Wind up missin' you[/tab]
